# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.1260
  biquad b0=1.00063376382 b1=-1.99679697525 b2=0.996293721529 a1=-1.99679697525 a2=0.996927485354
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 252.319 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.6056
  biquad b0=1.00177734004 b1=-1.99111183817 b2=0.989606037976 a1=-1.99111183817 a2=0.991383378015

  biquad b0=1.00048616566 b1=-1.99756192534 b2=0.997156882011 a1=-1.99756192534 a2=0.997643047673

  biquad b0=1.00942519853 b1=-1.94844527607 b2=0.944881028124 a1=-1.94844527607 a2=0.954306226654

  biquad b0=1.00051098994 b1=-1.99713690451 b2=0.997011708532 a1=-1.99713690451 a2=0.997522698476
